α nt : Type
Prod : Finset α → Finset nt → Type
inst✝ : Production α nt Prod
⊢ ∀ (α nt nt₂ : Type) (cfg : { cfg // ε ∉ cfg.GeneratedLanguage }),
    coerceLang α (↑cfg).Z (↑cfg).GeneratedLanguage =
      coerceLang α (↑(generate_equivalent_CNF α nt nt₂ cfg)).Z
        (↑(generate_equivalent_CNF α nt nt₂ cfg)).GeneratedLanguage
